pattern: Greedy left-to-right scan: whenever you encounter the leftmost remaining 0, you must flip the triple starting at that index — count flips and detect impossibility.
hints: Scan left to right. The first 0 you encounter can only be fixed by flipping the window [i, i+1, i+2]. Greedily flip there and increment the count.
After flipping, the 0 at i becomes 1. Continue scanning. If you reach a 0 at position n-2 or n-1 (cannot form a triple), return -1.
Simulate the flips with a difference array or a running parity flip counter to avoid O(n) per flip, making the total O(n).

edge_inputs.description: all zeros in length 3: one flip

stress.description: random binary arrays length up to 1000
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = rng.randint(3, size)
    nums = [rng.randint(0, 1) for _ in range(n)]
    return [nums]
